item.title: Cooper Kupp Celebrates 2026 Super Bowl Win by Lifting Lombardi Trophy with Wife Anna and Their 3 Sons
item.description: The wide receiver helped lead the Seattle Seahawks to a victory over the New England Patriots on Sunday, Feb. 8

item.title: Kehlani Dons a Tailored Suit in San Francisco Ahead of the Super Bowl, Plus Kate Hudson, Tyra Banks and More
item.description: From San Francisco to Beverly Hills, Calif., and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Kate Middleton and Prince William Break Their Silence on Epstein Files: ‘Deeply Concerned by the Continuing Revelations’
item.description: The Prince and Princess of Wales' spokesperson released the couple's first statement on the Epstein files on Monday, Feb. 9

item.title: Travis Kelce’s Ex Kayla Nicole Seemingly Shades Him and Taylor Swift in Super Bowl Ad, 4 Years After Breakup
item.description: Nicole appeared in an ad for Sleeper that aired during the 2026 Super Bowl and also starred the likes of Tiffany Haddish, Ben Simmons and Offset

item.title: Drake Loses $1M in Super Bowl Bet as the 'Drake Curse' Strikes Again
item.description: On Saturday, Feb. 7 Drake shared on Instagram that he had placed a $1,000000 bet on the New England Patriots to win Super Bowl 2026
